title: Possibly many small files created with Distributed Iceberg table
description:
### Describe the bug
Not sure if real issue. Maybe some squashing is missing. While running an insert in a Distributed Iceberg table with a small block size, it takes very long.
### How to reproduce
With:
```xml
<remote_servers>
<cluster0>
<shard>
<replica>
<host>localhost</host>
<port>9000</port>
</replica>
</shard>
</cluster0>
</remote_servers>
```
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/') SETTINGS iceberg_recent_metadata_file_by_last_updated_ms_field = 1;
CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 Int) ENGINE = Distributed('cluster0', default, t0);
SET min_insert_block_size_bytes = 4, preferred_block_size_bytes = 8;
INSERT INTO TABLE t1 (c0) SELECT c0 FROM generateRandom('c0 Int', 1769473117655636197, 1, 1) LIMIT 1000; --slow
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Here are the top 3 most common stack traces:
```
SELECT
arrayStringConcat(arrayMap(x -> demangle(addressToSymbol(x)), trace), '\n') AS t,
count() AS c
FROM system.trace_log
WHERE (query_id = 'cbd64241-bec8-49d6-b380-2eb68f303be9') AND (trace_type = 'CPU')
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY c DESC
LIMIT 3
SETTINGS allow_introspection_functions = 1
Query id: 2b7b9556-ec15-48db-b079-bdbff9197929
Row 1:
──────
t:
std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>>::replace(unsigned long, unsigned long, char const*, unsigned long)
DB::removeEscapedSlashes(std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> const&)
DB::IcebergStorageSink::initializeMetadata()
DB::IcebergStorageSink::finalizeBuffers()
DB::IcebergStorageSink::onFinish()
DB::runStep(std::__1::function<void ()>, std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ThreadGroup>&)
DB::ExceptionKeepingTransform::work()
DB::ExecutionThreadContext::executeTask()
DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStepImpl(unsigned long, DB::IAcquiredSlot*, std::__1::atomic<bool>*)
DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStep(std::__1::atomic<bool>*)
DB::PushingPipelineExecutor::finish()
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 DOUBLE, c3 INT) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE TABLE t3 (c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 DOUBLE) ENGINE=InnoDB;
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES ('test', 3.14, NULL), ('example', 2.71, 42);
INSERT INTO t3 (c1, c2) SELECT c1, c2 FROM t2 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE c2 > 2.0;
key_bug_features: Insert into Distributed Iceberg table with small block size
